runs.note: Fixed scope validation to accept both old and new scope formats during transition period. Added mapping from old scopes to new equivalents, implemented scope downgrade (intersection with approved scopes), and added deprecation logging when old scopes are used. Token responses now always contain new scope format only.

runs.note: Fixed scope validation to accept both old and new scope formats during 12-month transition period. Added scope mapping from old to new format, deprecation logging, and proper scope downgrade (intersection of requested vs approved scopes). Tokens now always contain new scope format regardless of what client requested.
